title: Live in London: Babymetal World Tour 2014
original_title: BABYMETAL WORLD TOUR 2014 - Live in London - The Forum
overview: BABYMETAL WORLD TOUR 2014 in London was a concert held on July 7, 2014, at The Forum in London, England.  This show marked BABYMETAL's first headline performance in England. Originally scheduled to be held at the Electric Ballroom, the venue was changed to The Forum due to high ticket demand. Prior to this concert, BABYMETAL performed at the Sonisphere UK 2014 festival on July 5, 2014.  This show was recorded for "Live Viewing" and streamed live in Japan at Zepp Tokyo in Tokyo.
